title: Calyptra Database Schema
description: Room database v2 - calyptra_database (MIGRATION_1_2 is additive: protection_events only)

blocked_stat.description: Daily ad block count. One row per calendar day.

count.description: Number of domains blocked on this date

operations.incrementCount: INSERT INTO BlockedStat (date, count) VALUES (:date, 1) ON CONFLICT(date) DO UPDATE SET count = count + 1 — atomic single-statement upsert

blocked_stat.notes: incrementCount is the primary write path. Creates row with count=1 on first call of the day; increments on subsequent calls. No separate insertIfNotExists step.

whitelisted_app.description: Apps excluded from VPN ad blocking. Checked at VPN tunnel setup.

operations.getAllPackageNames: SELECT packageName (returns List<String>, suspend) — used by VPN service at tunnel setup

whitelisted_app.notes: delete() takes a WhitelistedApp entity, not a packageName string. No isWhitelisted flow query — UI derives whitelist state from getAll().

protection_events.description: F13 tamper log (TML-L1): one row per protection state transition. Records protection STATE only — never domains or browsing activity (Constitution I). Added in v2.

timestampMillis.description: Epoch millis of the transition (system clock)

operations.eventsSince: SELECT WHERE timestampMillis >= :cutoff ORDER BY timestampMillis DESC, id DESC (Flow) — timeline UI
operations.prune: DELETE rows outside the newest-:keepCount AND older than :minTimestampMillis
operations.insertAndPrune: @Transaction insert + prune — the only production write path (FR-13.6)

protection_events.notes: Retention: newest 500 ∪ last 30 days (RetentionPolicy). Writes happen off the DNS packet path only (FR-13.2). ~20 KB worst case.
